name: Staked USDat
redeem: sUSDat is an ERC-4626 vault share redeemable for USDat (Saturn's permissioned stablecoin). Exit follows a 3-stage queue: (1) initiate unstaking with a minimum-USDat limit (min 10 USDat), (2) wait ~7 days while Saturn's processor sells STRC on secondary markets to source USDat — payout is pro-rata; reverts if below user's minimum, (3) claim USDat by burning the NFT receipt. Direct USDat-to-USDC redemption exists only for KYC-onboarded addresses. Non-KYC holders can exit instantly via sUSDat/USDC pools on Curve and Balancer at market price. Processing fee is ~10 bps. Users cannot update their minimum once batch processing starts.
notes: 100% backed by STRC (Strategy cumulative preferred equity, indirectly Bitcoin-exposed). Single-asset concentration risk. Permissioned underlying: USDat mint/redeem requires Saturn KYC onboarding, so non-KYC'd liquidators must exit via secondary markets. Upgradeable proxy. 7-day delayed redemption with limit-order mechanics. 30-day yield vesting prevents front-running. New protocol (launched 2026), limited track record. Key risks documented: BTC price shock and STRC dividend deferral. Curve pool depth ~$76K ±2% — large liquidations may face slippage.
